chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 1903 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.5380/2023 28.10.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant Mr. Aneel Zia, advocate for the respondent It is jointly submitted that the impugned judgment has not properly dealt with the law and record as befitting the last fact-finding forum of the statutory hierarchy, therefore, it may be just and proper for the impugned judgment to be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within two months. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
